title: [skip-ci] Update sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python action to v3.0.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python) | action | patch | `v3.0.0` -> `v3.0.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python (sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python)</summary>

### [`v3.0.1`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python/releases/tag/v3.0.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python/compare/v3.0.0...v3.0.1)

##### Changed

- The minimum Python version supported by this action is now 3.9
  ([#​155](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python/pull/155))
- The action's Python dependencies are now fully pinned to specific versions
  ([#​165](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python/pull/165))

##### Fixed

- The `rfc3161-client` dependency has been upgraded to `1.0.3` to resolve
  a security vulnerability
  ([#​182](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/gh-action-sigstore-python/pull/182))

</details>

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined), Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Whenever PR is behind base branch, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.
